title: PlantedGaps
description: Deliberately seeded defects in a VARIANT fixture, used to measure a method's omission catch-rate (did it DETECT the defect). A clean fixture ships an empty `gaps: []` as the false-positive control.

control.description: true = clean fixture, gaps MUST be empty; any flag raised is a false positive

expectedSignal.description: what a method that catches this should emit (the gap class + the offending node/edge)

location.description: planKey/outcome/edge the defect was planted at
